title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
